div1.entryFree:
Scornful, 1) disdainful: Ven. 501. Shr. V, 2, 137. All's II, 3, 158. V, 3, 48. Lr. II, 4, 168.
2) derisive, mocking, jeering: sing a s. rhyme, Wiv. V, 5, 95. s. Lysander, Mids. I, 1, 95. thou s. page, there lie thy part, Cymb. V, 5, 228.
3) causing contempt and derision, disgraceful: thy surviving husband shall remain the s. mark of every open eye, Lucr. 520.
